attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 NRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 NRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
 NRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
 NRM.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
 NRM.AR_TRX_KEY                    ,
 NRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
 NRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
 NRM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
 NRM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 NRM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 NRM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 NRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
 NRM.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    ,
 NRM.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY   , 
 NRM.SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,
 NRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     ,
 NRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  ,
 NRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       ,
 NRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 NRM.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    ,
 NRM.DD_GL_DATETIME                ,
 NRM.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
 NRM.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME            ,
 NRM.DV_FISCAL_DT                  ,
 NRM.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     ,
 NRM.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD          ,
 NRM.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD ,
 NRM.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD            ,
 NRM.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD       ,
 NRM.AR_TRX_DATETIME               ,
 NRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 NRM.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         ,
 NRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 NRM.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             ,
 NRM.DV_CHARGES_FLG                ,
 NRM.DV_MISC_FLG                   ,
 NRM.DV_SERVICE_FLG                ,
 NRM.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     ,
 NRM.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       ,
 NRM.DV_REVENUE_FLG                ,
 NRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
 NRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 NRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 NRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       ,
 NRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      ,
 NRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        ,
 NRM.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     ,
 NRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     ,
 NRM.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 NRM.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY           ,
 NRM.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY         ,
 NRM.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
 NRM.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
 NRM.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
 NRM.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           ,
 NRM.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         ,
 NRM.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD    ,
 NRM.GL_DT,
 NRM.BK_SS_CD                        ,
 NRM.DV_EXTENDED_QTY                  ,
 NRM.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
 NRM.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
 NRM.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
 NRM.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD           ,
 NRM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
 NRM.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
 NRM.TRANSACTION_DT,
 NRM.GL_POSTED_DTM, 
 BARI.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,
 NRM.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY ,
 /*Added as part of Q1FY15 - OA*/
 NRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 NRM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 NRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 NRM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD 
 ,NRM.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     /* Added is part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 ,NRM.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT ,           /* Added is part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 NRM.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,   /* Added is part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 NRM.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME, /* pneelraj : Added is part of  ICPM Q2FY16*/
 COALESCE(NRM.XCAT_FLG,'N'), /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
 COALESCE( NRM.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME, 'Others' ) , /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
 COALESCE(NRM.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,'N' ),   /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */      
 COALESCE(NRM.ELA_FLG,'N' )   /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */     
 ,NRM.POB_TYPE_CD 
 ,NRM.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /* ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY20 ICPM ACCOUNTING_RULE */
 ,NRM.NET_PRICE_FLG
 ,NRM.CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG
 ,NRM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
 ,NRM.BUNDLE_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
 ,NRM.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
 FROM
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE NRM,
  $$STGDB.WI_GL_INV_END_CUST_RETRO_POS  BARI
 WHERE
  NRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = BARI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY 
  AND NRM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY <> BARI.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
  AND NRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = BARI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
     AND DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD ='POS ALLOCATION'
 AND NRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('POS', 'SLS_ADJ')

SELECT 
 GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
 ,GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 ,GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
 ,GL.XCAT_FLG AS XCAT_FLG                
 ,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
 ,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
 ,GL.ELA_FLG                       
 ,GL.XCAT_FLG AS NEW_XCAT_FLG                  
 ,OMAP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME AS NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME        
 ,OMAP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG AS NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG       
 ,CASE WHEN NEW_XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE OMAP.ELA_FLG END  AS NEW_ELA_FLG   
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REVENUE_MEASURE GL
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
 ON GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  = RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_OFFER_TYPE_PRDT_MAP OMAP
 ON  GL.PRODUCT_KEY = OMAP.PRODUCT_KEY
 AND GL.DV_PRODUCT_KEY= OMAP.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
 AND GL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD = OMAP.BK_OFFER_ATTRBTN_TYPE_CD 
WHERE /* GL.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD ='POS ALLOCATION'   */       /* COMMENTED AS PART OF MAY21ST REL */
 GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('POS', 'SLS_ADJ')
 AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 3
 AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE >= 0 
 AND OMAP.EDW_UPDATE_DTM >( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
 WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WI_GL_REV_END_CUST_RETRO_POS' AND TABLE_NAME ='WI_GL_RORTRO_MAP_FLG_POS')
 AND ( GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME <>OMAP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME 
 OR GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG <> OMAP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
 OR GL.ELA_FLG <> (CASE WHEN NEW_XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE OMAP.ELA_FLG END )
 )
 AND 1=2

SELECT
 REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
 ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 ,REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
 ,GL.XCAT_FLG                      
 ,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
 ,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
 ,GL.ELA_FLG                       
 /* ,NSO.XCAT_FLG AS NEW_XCAT_FLG  */
,(CASE WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG ELSE  NP.XCAT_FLG END) AS NEW_XCAT_FLG /*  added as part of april9th2017 */                              
,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME AS NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME   /*  added as part of april9th2017 */       
,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG AS NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG	 /*  added as part of april9th2017 */       
,GL.ELA_FLG AS NEW_ELA_FLG	 /*  added as part of april9th2017 */ 
 ,'Y' AS XCAT_FLG_UPD
 ,'N' AS MAP_FLGS_UPD 
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REVENUE_MEASURE GL
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
 ON GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  = RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
 ON GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
 INNER JOIN	(SELECT  ITEM_KEY,XCAT_FLG,EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT )  NP
 ON GL.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY
 WHERE NSO.END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
 /* AND GL.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD ='POS ALLOCATION'   */       /* COMMENTED AS PART OF MAY21ST REL */
 AND GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('POS', 'SLS_ADJ')
 AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 3
 AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE >= 0
 AND NSO.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME >( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
 WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WI_GL_REV_END_CUST_RETRO_POS' AND TABLE_NAME ='WI_GL_RORTRO_XCAT_MAP_FLG_POS' )
 AND GL.XCAT_FLG <> (CASE WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG ELSE  NP.XCAT_FLG END)
 AND 1=2
 
 UNION 
 SELECT
 REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
 ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 ,REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
 ,GL.XCAT_FLG                      
 ,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
 ,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
 ,GL.ELA_FLG                       
 /* ,NP.XCAT_FLG AS NEW_XCAT_FLG  */ 
,(CASE WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG ELSE  NP.XCAT_FLG END) AS NEW_XCAT_FLG /*  added as part of april9th2017 */   
 ,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME AS NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
 ,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG AS NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
 ,GL.ELA_FLG AS NEW_ELA_FLG
 ,'Y' AS XCAT_FLG_UPD
 ,'N' AS MAP_FLGS_UPD
 
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REVENUE_MEASURE GL
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
 ON GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  = RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
 ON GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
 INNER JOIN  (SELECT  ITEM_KEY,XCAT_FLG,EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT )   NP
 ON GL.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY
 WHERE NSO.END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
/* AND GL.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD ='POS ALLOCATION'   */       /* COMMENTED AS PART OF MAY21ST REL */
 AND GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('POS', 'SLS_ADJ')
 AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 3
 AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE >= 0
 AND NP.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME >( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
 WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WI_GL_REV_END_CUST_RETRO_POS' AND TABLE_NAME ='WI_GL_RORTRO_XCAT_MAP_FLG_POS')
 AND GL.XCAT_FLG <> (CASE WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG ELSE   NP.XCAT_FLG END)
 AND 1=2

SELECT 
 REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
 ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 ,REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
 ,XCAT_FLG                      
 ,BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
 ,RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
 ,ELA_FLG                       
 ,NEW_XCAT_FLG                  
 ,NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME        
 ,NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG       
 ,NEW_ELA_FLG  
 ,'N' AS XCAT_FLG_UPD 
 ,'Y' AS MAP_FLGS_UPD                
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_RORTRO_MAP_FLG_POS MAPFLG 
 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_RORTRO_XCAT_MAP_FLG_POS CMN
 WHERE CMN.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = MAPFLG.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
 AND CMN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = MAPFLG.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
 AND CMN.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = MAPFLG.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
 )
